author: Quoia75
msg:
Bruh, I wouldn't call it panic. Just the next critical thing that **really** needs to be addressed before the big push to the public.

Here's an UNO trying to recruit ULOs:

"Hey! Wanna try this app that lets you earn $XX a month in extra income? Oh btw, it only pays in crypto. Oh, yeah if you want to withdraw you can only withdraw in these 5 cryptocurrencies. Oh, also, you need to set up your own crypto wallet. Oh by the way, there are sooo many scams in crypto right now, here's some education to keep you safe! Oh, that 24 words your wallet creates? That's called a seed phrase - when the scammers start calling you make sure you never ever give it out! Here's how to keep you safe, I'll teach you about hard wallets too....How do you withdraw? Oh, that's right, go to this separate link outside of the app."

Yup, nothing to be be concerned about here.🤟

Def a work-in-progress.

author: Jamie King | Minutes Network
msg:
[Photo] **Unity Network - Unity Marketplace Final Community Poll**

**UNO holders, please note** 👇

Following the conclusion of the recent Telegram polls, we are now moving into the final stage of community polling on the minimum UNO / ULO split for Unity Marketplace leases.

**The two options included in the final poll are:**
60% UNO / 40% ULO
50% UNO / 50% ULO

**What to expect:**
Eligible participants will receive an email invitation.
The email will be sent to the email address used for your Unity Node order.
Participation is completed via the Unity website.
You’ll receive a one-time passcode (OTP) by email to verify your identity.

**Polling window:**
Opens: Now
Closes: Sunday, Feb 1st at 7pm CET

**Important notes**
This applies only to public Unity Marketplace leases.
Each participant may submit one selection only.
Submissions cannot be changed once completed.
Results will only be shown / published after the polling window closes.

👉 If you don’t see the email, please check your spam/junk folder before raising a support ticket.

Thank you to everyone for taking part in this important final step in shaping Unity Marketplace lease terms.

-The Unity Network Team
